productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Black Shoes
description: Casual mid-top styling on a formal cut, this shoe from U.S. Polo Association showcases the brand's commitment to quality and innovation. This shoe can either be worn with your casual ensembles - style it with a plaid shirt, a monochrome tee and denims, or dress it up for semi-formal occasions with fitted, clean-look denims, a crisp shirt and a blazer!UpperMid-top styling on textured leather upperSix hole lace upsPadded innerUpper stitched to the outsole for durabilityStitch detail across the toe capBranding embossed on the lateral side of the heelOutsoleTPU outsole with quadrilateral lugs all overShoe careWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
